summary: Tested Admin Panel features: Quick Order Actions, Peak Hours analytics chart, Daily Sales Summary endpoint, and Analytics date range filter. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Quick Order Actions buttons (Complete, WhatsApp, Copy) properly implemented with data-testid attributes
Peak Hours chart renders correctly with bar chart and period breakdown cards
Date range filter dependency array fix (from [chartDays, isToday] to [dateRange.from, dateRange.to, isToday]) working correctly
Daily summary endpoint properly sends email with correct html_body parameter
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin features from this iteration verified working. Quick Order Actions visible on orders page. Peak Hours chart renders with insights. Date range filter properly refetches data when changed.

quick_order_actions_complete_button.details: Complete button (green) visible for pending/confirmed orders, triggers order completion flow

quick_order_actions_whatsapp_button.details: WhatsApp button visible for orders with phone numbers, opens wa.me link with pre-filled message

quick_order_actions_copy_button.details: Copy button visible for all orders, copies order info to clipboard with toast notification

peak_hours_chart_rendering.details: Bar chart renders on /panelgsnadminbackend/analytics with 24-hour data, shows peak hour and busiest period

peak_hours_period_breakdown.details: Period breakdown cards (Morning, Afternoon, Evening, Night) display correct order counts

peak_hours_api_endpoint.details: GET /api/analytics/peak-hours returns hourly data array (24 entries) and insights object

daily_summary_endpoint.details: POST /api/admin/send-daily-summary successfully triggers email send with correct parameters

analytics_date_range_today.details: Clicking 'Today' switches to hourly view with 'Today (Hourly)' label and hourly charts

analytics_date_range_7days.details: Clicking 'Last 7 days' refetches daily chart data for 7-day period

analytics_date_range_30days.details: Clicking 'Last 30 days' refetches daily chart data for 30-day period

analytics_date_range_filter_fix.details: Date range filter bug fixed - useCallback now depends on [dateRange.from, dateRange.to, isToday], correctly refetches data when filter changes
